title: Parenting Helplines * Foster Parents - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Parenting & Childcare > Parenting Helplines * Foster Parents 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Disabilities Issues Foster Parents Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers support, resource referral, and additional after-hours support for foster parents. Eligibility: Any foster parent with an ODHS Child Welfare case or in the Oregon Foster Care System Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email 211 Visit Website More Details FOSTERCLUB FOSTER PARENT RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides resource parents of foster youth resources that are youth-informed to help provide perspective on how to be the best support for a young person in care. 620 S Holladay Drive #1 Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Resource Parents Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 717-1552 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FOSTERCLUB FOSTER PARENT RESOURCES
